message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.astype (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame.astype dtype
casting:

- astype_int_to_float: 2-col Int64 frame -> Float64 (1 -> 1.0 etc.)
- astype_float_to_int: 1-col Float64 frame -> Int64 (truncating
  fractional parts: 1.7 -> 1, 2.3 -> 2, 3.0 -> 3)

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.astype(dtype)), runs the Rust DataFrame.astype(DType::*),
and asserts parity via compare_dataframe_expected. DataFrameAstype
was already wired through the Frame response branch; this fills the
live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-yvylj]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
